name: enterprise_saas
description: Enterprise SaaS with long sales cycles and sticky customers. Decline is slow and gradual — agent must resist false alarms in early saturation and read enterprise-specific signals. Medium difficulty.
data_sources: Gainsight 2023 — enterprise B2B monthly churn avg 0.8% (approx 10% annual net)
Carta 2024 — enterprise seed burn $150-180K/mo (sales team + compliance overhead)
Doran 2024 — B2B SaaS avg NPS 41, top quartile 60+
OpenView 2023-2024 — B2B SaaS at $1-5M ARR grows 25-35% YoY (~2.2%/mo avg)
Crunchbase 2024 — enterprise seed runway median 20 months

real_world_parallel.example: Notion pivot from Mac design tool (month 24, 3mo runway) — crisis clarity forced scope reduction

notes: Enterprise churn 0.8%/mo = real Gainsight 2023 data. Low churn means agent must not panic-pivot on early saturation. High burn ($150K) because enterprise needs sales team.
